title: Candace Owens shuts down presidential rumors while pushing Tucker Carlson into the 2028 conversation
summary_full: Candace Owens said she has no interest in running for president in 2028 and joked that she would rather be a dictator. During an interview at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum, she threw her support behind Tucker Carlson as a possible presidential candidate. Carlson has denied any plans to run, but speculation about his political future continues.
